Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder

Class AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletGoalTemplate
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate
public class AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate extends TacletGoalTemplate
this class inherits from TacletGoalTemplate. It is used if there is a replacewith in the ruleGoals that replaces a sequent with a sequent. The replacewith for terms/formulae is realized in another class calles RewriteTacletGoalTemplate.

      public AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, ImmutableList<Taclet> addedRules, Sequent replacewith, ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> pvs)
      creates new Goaldescription
      Parameters:
      addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
      addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch
      replacewith - the Sequent that replaces another one
